code:
import io
import string

let line = io.read_line()
match line
when Some(s)
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut total = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut stop = false
  while i < parts.len() and not stop
    match parts.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(n)
        if total + n > 100
          stop = true
        else
          total = total + n
        end
      when None
        stop = true
      end
    when None
      stop = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("total=#{total}")
when None
  println("total=0")
end
